top_signals.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
top_signals.summary: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
